## Summary

<!-- One paragraph describing the change. Why does it exist? -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New ergonomic command (Layer A)
- [ ] Generic / protocol change (Layer B)
- [ ] Auth / config / profile
- [ ] Documentation / wiki / skill
- [ ] Internal refactor (no UX impact)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` produces a working `dist/cli.js`
- [ ] Updated `wiki/commands.md` (if a new command was added)
- [ ] Updated `wiki/tools-catalog.md` (if upstream tool catalog drift)
- [ ] Updated `src/lib/aliases.ts` (if a new ergonomic alias was added)
- [ ] No new dependencies, or — if there are — they're justified in the PR body
